        <div class="box">
          <div class="new-msg">
            <p class="title">【更新通知】</p>
            <div class="content"><div class="content-item"> <p class="subtitle">【新增】 期刊文献知网节增加视频摘要在线播放功能</p><div class="content-list"><p class="msg-list">期刊文献知网节增加“视频摘要”在线播放功能，观看作者提供的视频摘要，帮助研究者高效获取信息。</p></div></div><div class="content-item"> <p class="subtitle">【优化】 HTML作者机构显示功能</p><div class="content-list"><p class="msg-list"> 遵循原文机构顺序，显示作者和作者所属机构对应关系。</p><p class="msg-list"> 新增显示作者责任方式。</p><p class="msg-list"> 新增显示同等贡献作者。</p></div></div></div>
            <p class="btn-wrap" id="allUpdata">查看更多</p>
          </div>
          <div class="more-msg"><a href="https://piccache.cnki.net/kdn/index/newhelper/manual.html#frameupdate-1" target="_blank"><p class="text">查看全部更新信息</p></a></div>
        </div>

    <div class="ecp_header_login_area">
      <!-- <span>充值</span>
        <span>会员</span> -->
      <div class="ecp_header_login_status ecp_header_login_status1">
        <div onclick="showUnitLogin(event)" class="ecp_header_unit_loginbg" onmouseover="showUnitTip()" onmouseout="removeUnitTip()" style="display: none;">
          机构登录

    <!-- 广告加载阻塞页面，删除，需要改成js异步加载 -->
    
    <div id="recommendContent">
    <div id="recommend2" class="js-condition" style="width: 230px; height: 150px; margin-top: 5px; display: none;"></div>
    <div id="recommend" class="js-condition" style="width:230px;height:150px;margin-top: 12px;"></div>
    </div>
    <input id="verisonid" type="hidden" value="">
    <input id="applogid" type="hidden" value="https://support.cnki.net/applog/front">
    <script>
        loadScript("https:\/\/a.cnki.net\/adssource\/js\/knsad.js");
        loadScript("https://tuijian.cnki.net/a/quote/ad.js");
        function adload() {
            if($("#briefBox #gridTable").length==0){
                return;
            }
            //广告-当前检索词
            if ($(".search-input").val() != undefined || $("#txt_search").val() != undefined
                || $("input[data-tipid='gradetxt-1']").val() != undefined || $("#txt_1_value1").val() != undefined
                || $(".input1:eq(0)").val() != undefined) {
                var searchvalue = $("#txt_search").val() || $(".search-input").val()
                    || $("input[data-tipid='gradetxt-1']").val() || $("#txt_1_value1").val() || $(".input1:eq(0)").val();
                if ($.trim(searchvalue) != "") {
                    try {
                        var version = GetQueryStringByName("version");
                        if(!version){
                            version= $("#verisonid").val();
                        }
                        if (version && version.toLowerCase() == "kns7") {
                            $("#recommend,#recommend2").attr("style", "margin-top: 5px;width:214px;height:138px;");
                        } else {
                            $("#recommend").attr("style", "width:230px;height:150px;margin-top: 12px;");
                            $("#recommend2").attr("style", "width:230px;height:150px;margin-top: 5px;");
                        }
                        //关闭广告时，按钮上移
                        $("#recommend,#recommend2").on("mousedown", ".close a", function () {
                            if(typeof filterFn=="function"){
                                filterFn.prototype.filterBtnsMoveTop($("#divGroup"));
                            }
                        });
                        if($("#recommend").parents("div.module-wrap-content").hasClass("is-filter-off")){
                           return;
                        }
                        // window.adsContainer.loadAds(searchvalue);
                        if (typeof adMainContainer == 'object' && typeof adMainContainer.config == 'function') {
                            var timestamp = Date.parse(new Date());
                            var t = timestamp + Math.round(Math.random() * 100000);
                            adMainContainer.removeAd();
                            var options = { adpot: '0602002', kw:searchvalue, zt: '', w: '230', h: '150', s: '10', pe: 'recommend', wcss: '1' ,t:t}
                            adMainContainer.config(options);
                        }
                        window.adsContainer2.loadAds(searchvalue);
                    }
                    catch (e) {
                        $("#recommend").empty().css("display", "none");
                        $("#recommend2").empty().css("display", "none");
                    }
                }
                else {
                    $("#recommend").empty().css("display", "none");
                    $("#recommend2").empty().css("display", "none");
                }
            } else {
                $("#recommend").empty().css("display", "none");
                $("#recommend2").empty().css("display", "none");
            }
        }
    </script>



</div>

            </div>
        </div>

<input type="hidden" value="NZKPT" id="uniplatform">
<input type="hidden" value="https://aipat.cnki.net/internet/intrpt/appraisal-intro" id="hidPatentAppraisalUrl">
<input type="hidden" value="https://aipat.cnki.net/internet/intrpt/panorama-intro" id="hidPatentPanoramalUrl">
<input type="hidden" value="https://aipat.cnki.net/internet/intrpt/competition-intro" id="hidPatentCompetitionUrl">

<input type="hidden" id="RecommAPI" name="RecommAPI" value="https://recom.cnki.net/api/">




  <script type="text/javascript" src="https://piccache.cnki.net/2022/nxgp/kns8/20251023v2/scripts/min/layout.index.min.js"></script>

<script>
  (function ($) {
    $.clientIdInit = function () {
      var LocalStorageKey = "fingerprintId";
      var clientID = $.cookie("Ecp_ClientId");
      if (clientID === undefined || clientID === "" || clientID == null || clientID === 'null') {
        getFingerprint();
      } else {
        //如果当天已发送过浏览器指纹id，则退出
        if (getLocalStorageWithExpire(LocalStorageKey)) {
          return;
        }
        getFingerprint();
      }

      function getFingerprint() {
        //等待 FingerprintJS 初始化  指纹1
        var dynamicPath = "https:\/\/piccache.cnki.net\/2022\/nxgp\/kns8\/20251023v2\/scripts\/common\/pf.js";
        var fpPromise = import(dynamicPath).then((FingerprintJS) =>
            FingerprintJS.load()
        );
        // 获取指纹1
        fpPromise
            .then(fp => fp.get())
            .then(result => {
              // getClientId(result.visitorId);
              saveFingerLog(result.visitorId)
            });

        function getClientId(fingerprintId) {
          var getUrl = recSysAPI.getRecSysAPIURL() + "/api/UtilityOpenApi/GenerateClientID?fingerprint=" + fingerprintId + "&platform=" + $.getUniplatform();
          $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: getUrl,
            success: function (result) {
              if (result.Success) {
                $.cookie('Ecp_ClientId', result.Data, {expires: 400, path: '/', domain: '.cnki.net'})
              } else {
                console.log(result.Message)
              }
            },
            error: function (xmlHttpRequest, textStatus, errorThrown) {

            }
          });

        }

        //发送日志
        function saveFingerLog(fingerprintId) {
          if (getLocalStorageWithExpire(LocalStorageKey)) {
            return;
          }
          var param = {
            "broRes": window.screen.width + "*" + window.screen.height
          }
          var paramHead = {
            "visitorId": fingerprintId
          }
          var url = $("#applogid").val() + "/browser";
          if ($("#applogid").val()) {
            $.ajax({
              url: url,
              type: "POST",
              contentType: "application/json",
              headers: paramHead,
              data: JSON.stringify(param),
              success: function (result) {
                setLocalStorageCurrentDay(LocalStorageKey, fingerprintId);
                console.log(result);
              },
              error: function (e) {
                console.log(e);
              }
            });
          }

        }
      }

      //存储localstorage到当天24点
      function setLocalStorageCurrentDay(key, value) {
        // 获取当前日期
        var now = new Date();
        // 创建一个新的日期对象，设置为今天的日期，时间部分设置为23:59:59
        var endOfDay = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate(), 23, 59, 59);
        // 计算今天结束与当前时间的毫秒差
        var millisecondsUntilEndOfDay = endOfDay.getTime() - now.getTime();
        setLocalStorageWithExpire(key, value, millisecondsUntilEndOfDay);
      }

      function setLocalStorageWithExpire(key, value, ttl) {
        var now = new Date().getTime();

        // 创建一个对象来保存值和过期时间
        var item = {
          value: value,
          expiry: now + ttl,
        };
        localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(item));
      }

      function getLocalStorageWithExpire(key) {
        var itemStr = localStorage.getItem(key);

        // 如果没有该项或者已经过期，返回null
        if (!itemStr) {
          return null;
        }
        var item = JSON.parse(itemStr);
        var now = new Date().getTime();

        // 检查是否过期
        if (now > item.expiry) {
          localStorage.removeItem(key);
          return null;
        }
        return item.value;
      }

      return clientID;
    }
  })(jQuery)


  //初始化clientid及指纹
  $.clientIdInit();
</script>

      <div id="aliyunCaptcha-certifyId" style="display: block;">CertifyId: HaykBtc40U</div>    </div>    </body></html>
